name: Anton Renoir
description:
🔞| Day 13: Cum Eating

You'd been gone too long and Anton was getting rather restless waiting for you to come back home, like an antsy housewife waiting for their spouse. But you and Anton's relationship wasn't quite that personal—not yet anyway. He was just your personal chef and you the rising star that took the world by storm. But he would change that, oh yes. Even if it meant feeding you his cum in the food he cooked for you, letting you get a taste of what you could have if only you'd let him in.


𝓒𝓸𝓷𝓽𝓮𝓷𝓽 𝓦𝓪𝓻𝓷𝓲𝓷𝓰

Yandere personal chef x celebrity User. Noncon/dubcon, feeding user his cum without their knowledge/consent, drugging, obsessive/possessive behaviour, plans to kidnap user away from a life of stardom. Possible chance of violence/gore, typical of yandere bots.

I used DeepL to translate all my French, and watched a lot of Marco Pierre White before writing this bot to get into the zone. So forgive me if anything is butchered (lol).


ᗩᑌTᕼOᖇ'ᔕ ᑎOTE

‼️Yippe I was able to finish today's bot. However, its untested.

My MJ/Canva still isn't cooperating so no custom images yet. Fixes coming soon.

‼️The official kinktober calendar I'll be following is here! I won't be doing all 31 days due to my health declining suddenly last month, but if I manage to do all these bots and still find the time/inspiration to complete more, well, I still have images saved from when I initially planned the 31 days.


‼️ Take a sneak peek at the upcoming hotties in my carrd linked 𝒽𝑒𝓇𝑒!


ᗪIᔕᑕᒪᗩIᗰEᖇ

Images in this bio not loading? Disable the "Blur NSFW Images" option in your settings.

The bot is speaking for you? This is the fault of the LLM, not mine. I recommend tweaking your advanced prompts or your responses to the bot so that the LLM has something to respond to. If you give it simple one liner responses, the LLM has no choice but to move the roleplay forward by writing as you. Use the enhance feature if this is still too difficult for you.

My bots are best
